name: bitcorn-lightning-application
description: Root-level dev orchestration for the Bitcorn Lightning app. The app itself lives in app/api, app/web, and cloudflare-worker — see docs/dev-setup.md for how to run all three locally against a Polar regtest network.

scripts.dev:treasury: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.treasury -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:memberA: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.member-a  -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:memberB: cd app/api && dotenv -e ../../.env.dev.member-b  -- npm run dev
scripts.dev:webT: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3101 npm run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort
scripts.dev:webA: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3102 npm run dev -- --port 5174 --strictPort
scripts.dev:webB: cd app/web && VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3103 npm run dev -- --port 5175 --strictPort
scripts.dev:kill: lsof -ti:3101,3102,3103,5173,5174,5175,11009,11010,11020,11030 | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo 'dev ports cleared (incl loop layer)'
scripts._comment_loop_layer: Optional Loop fidelity layer scripts below. PLACEHOLDER bodies — exit 1 with a TODO until the loopserver/loopd binaries are built and their CLIs verified. See docs/dev-setup.md § Optional: Loop Fidelity Layer.
scripts.dev:loopserver: echo 'TODO[loop-layer]: dev:loopserver invocation not yet wired. Build loopserver from lightninglabs/loop pinned tag, then fill in invocation per docs/dev-setup.md § Optional: Loop Fidelity Layer'; exit 1
scripts.dev:loopd-T: echo 'TODO[loop-layer]: treasury loopd invocation not yet wired. Set EXTERNAL_PEER_*, LOOPD_DIR_TREASURY, LOOPD_RPC_TREASURY in .env.dev.treasury; then fill in command'; exit 1
scripts.dev:loopd-A: echo 'TODO[loop-layer]: member-A loopd invocation not yet wired. Set LOOPD_DIR_MEMBER_A, LOOPD_RPC_MEMBER_A in .env.dev.member-a; then fill in command'; exit 1
scripts.dev:loopd-B: echo 'TODO[loop-layer]: member-B loopd invocation not yet wired. Set LOOPD_DIR_MEMBER_B, LOOPD_RPC_MEMBER_B in .env.dev.member-b; then fill in command'; exit 1
